stemHtml: Refer to figures and/or to Air Traffic Control section page GSP-470 from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017. One of the images shows an extract of an ATC Flight Plan as presented in a briefing pack produced by a flight planning program. Decode the text associated with ITEM 16 that is highlighted in red.

options.a: ESPA is the departure aerodrome, 6 hours 5 minutes is the endurance, and ESNU is the destination aerodrome.
options.b: ESPA is the destination aerodrome, 6 hours 5 minutes is the flight time, and ESNU is the alternate aerodrome.
options.c: ESPA is the departure aerodrome, 06:05 UTC is the estimated off-block time, and ESNU is the destination aerodrome.
options.d: ESPA is the destination aerodrome, 6 hours 5 minutes is the endurance, and ESNU is the alternate aerodrome.
